_about: Phase 0 retrieval eval set for Memex. Queries labeled with the wiki page stem(s) that should be retrieved, run against the bundled sample vault (sample_vault::SAMPLE_NOTES). Mix of semantic paraphrases and exact-term/acronym queries (the latter are where dense Gemma embeddings are weakest and BM25 will help in Phase 1). Edit freely; the harness reads this file.
